name: Baseline
description: Average weekday demand pattern. No unusual weather or events.

name: Heat Wave
description: Extended heat event (>32°C). Cooling demand surge increases consumption at all nodes.
note: Severity scale: 1 = one level worse (GREEN->AMBER), 2 = two levels (GREEN->RED)

name: Solar Peak
description: Cloudless summer afternoon. Maximum solar feed-in at southern nodes.
note: Negative = improvement. Groningen wind node benefits from reduced demand relative to supply.

name: EV Fleet Night Charging
description: 22:00-06:00 window when logistics fleets plug in simultaneously.

name: Adjacent Substation Outage
description: Planned maintenance on adjacent substation forces rerouting. Temporary severity increase.
